expectations.evidence: Written in first person: 'I build software systems...', 'I work as both an IC...', 'I also founded...'
Focuses on professional positioning and work scope, not on the impact-over-difficulty framing. No mention of growing people or what drives him.
Mostly clean, though uses 'structural advantage' and 'designed to last' which are borderline
No mention of medicine, Deadiron, music, or the non-linear path. Generic professional framing only.
